author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #31 - Video Game Survey is confirmed. Join us TODAY at 19:00 UTC!  

This week’s topic is the Video Game Survey (https://forms.gle/BH8eGP9nqCkJ9UwJ9): what are the most common answers, what does the community want to see, what excites people the most about blockchain games and more! 

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future and much more. 

See you all on today at 19:00 UTC in the Voice Channel! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1021788495741734982
